## Problem

What workflow or limitation should this feature address?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the behavior you want.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any other approaches you considered.

## Keyboard Or UI Impact

List any new screens, shortcuts, focus behavior, or layout changes.

## Scope

- [ ] Keeps the app read-only
- [ ] Requires editing support
- [ ] Requires a new dependency
- [ ] Requires config or `.env` changes
- [ ] Affects Glow rendering
- [ ] Affects the built-in renderer

## Additional Context

Add screenshots, examples, or links to similar tools if helpful.
